title: Announcements

Announcements

Graduate School

Announcements

PhD Proficiency Exam Application

30
						January

2019

The application for "PhD Proficiency Exam Mai 2019" is began. Students who want to take the exam are required to write a brief (application letter) to our Social Science Instutue with their own handwriting until March 1, 2019. In order to apply for this exam, the student completed all program courses the end of 2018 - 2019 Fall Semester and has delivered all documents. Applicants should check his/her documents from our Student Affairs Office.
